name: Matt Rife
oneLine: American stand-up comedian who broke out on TikTok with viral crowd-work clips.
bio: Matt Rife is an American stand-up comic who rose to mainstream fame in 2022-2023 after clips of his crowd work went viral on TikTok, filling arenas across the US. His Netflix debut Natural Selection (November 2023) was followed by Lucid - A Crowd Work Special (2024), Netflix's first full-length crowd-work-only stand-up special, filmed at The Comedy Zone in Charlotte, and Unwrapped - A Christmas Crowd Work Special (Dec 2 2025), filmed in Phoenix and directed by fellow comedian Erik Griffin.
style: Stand-up specials and crowd-work club sets, distributed via TikTok clips and Netflix
notable: Matt Rife: Lucid - A Crowd Work Special (Netflix, 2024)
